nasb.text: Moses said, “This is the thing which the Lord has commanded you to do, that the glory of the Lord may appear to you.”

esv.text: And Moses said, “This is the thing that the Lord commanded you to do, that the glory of the Lord may appear to you.”

cnv.text: 摩西說：“這是耶和華吩咐你們的事，你們要照著行，耶和華的榮耀就要向你們顯現。”

ccb.text: 摩西对他们说：“耶和华吩咐你们这样做，是为了向你们显出祂的荣耀。”
